title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Rajiv Gandhi National Institute of Youth Development Act, 2012. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1.19th November, 2012, vide notification No. S.O. 2747(E), dated 19th November, 2012, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
